case.title: REMINGTON RAND v. NATIONAL LABOR RELATIONS BOARD

opinion.h: REMINGTON RAND v. NATIONAL LABOR RELATIONS BOARD, 304 U.S. 576 (1938)
REMINGTON RAND, Inc., petitioner, v. NATIONAL LABOR RELATIONS BOARD.* No. 970.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. George H. Bond, of Syracuse, N. Y., and George H. Cohen, of Hartford, Conn., for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 304 .S. 590 , 58 S. Ct. 1054, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Remington Rand v. National Labor Relations Board 304 U.S. 576 (1938) ]
